text:
In episode 10 from the second anime series, Roy Mustang has a flashback to the Ishvalan War of Extermination showing an Ishvalan resistance fighter engaging some Amestrian soldiers with a Maxim M1910 machine gun. It would later be revealed that was Aerugo that provided this and others types of weaponry to Isvhalans.

Trivia

This weapon is a Russian-adopted version of the Maxim, adopted originally in 1905 with a bronze water-jacket but modified and standardized to a corrugated-type jacket in 1910.
